topic: diagnose raw 92 falsifier section absence vs raw 97 9-check matrix gate — why did registration-time precondition gate not catch the falsifier omission for post-raw-71 raw 92

beta_qrng.payload_summary: qrng_byte=35 source=urandom (obs_2 reframe — T1 length=1024 queue active)

gamma_bridge.payload_summary: bridge_pick=bridge_gaia invocation=tool/gaia_bridge.hexa (real fetch deferred to sub-agent or OFFLINE-FALLBACK)

falsifiers_preregistered.condition: chronology hypothesis — raw 97 registration ts is AFTER raw 92 registration ts
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: git log --all --reverse -G '^raw 97 new' .raw vs git log --all -S 'format-ai-native-canonical' .raw — compare AuthorDate
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: raw_97_reg_ts > raw_92_reg_ts → PASS (gate could not have fired at raw 92 reg moment); raw_97_reg_ts <= raw_92_reg_ts → FAIL (chronology cannot explain the gap, deeper bypass investigation required)

falsifiers_preregistered.condition: tool implementation hypothesis — tool/raw_registration_gate_lint.hexa first commit is AFTER raw 97 registration AND AFTER raw 92 registration
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: git log --all --reverse -- tool/raw_registration_gate_lint.hexa | head -1; compare against raw 92 reg ts
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: tool_first_commit_ts > raw_92_reg_ts → PASS (forward-spec gap; tool absent at raw 92 reg moment); tool_first_commit_ts <= raw_92_reg_ts → FAIL (tool existed but didn't run — bypass mode must be diagnosed)

falsifiers_preregistered.condition: hook wiring hypothesis — ~/.claude/settings.json PreToolUse hook is NOT wired to invoke tool/raw_registration_gate_lint.hexa on Write/Edit of .raw/.own
falsifiers_preregistered.mechanism: fs grep on canonical hook config
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: no PreToolUse entry mentioning raw_registration_gate_lint → PASS (hook not yet wired; runtime enforcement absent regardless of tool existence); hook present and active → FAIL (must investigate why it didn't block raw 92's pre-strengthening write)

falsifiers_preregistered.condition: explicit grandfather hypothesis — raw 97's own scope clause exempts entries registered before raw 97's own commit
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: read .raw lines 2189-2236 for scope/grandfather clause text
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: scope text contains 'pre-existing entries grandfathered' OR 'registration MOMENT only' → PASS (raw 92 is structurally exempt from raw 97 retroactive scope); no grandfather clause → FAIL (raw 92 should be in scope and gate non-firing requires alternate explanation)

falsifiers_preregistered.condition: 9-check matrix coverage hypothesis — raw 97's matrix DOES list raw 71 falsifier-presence as one of the 9 checks
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: read raw 97 declaration line for matrix enumeration
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: matrix enumerates 'raw 71 falsifier' → PASS (matrix is well-formed; the gate WOULD have caught raw 92 had it existed and been wired — proves chronology+forward-spec is the actual root cause); matrix omits raw 71 → FAIL (matrix design itself is defective and root cause is matrix-completeness, not chronology)

falsifiers_preregistered.condition: retroactive remediation hypothesis — raw 92 has been strengthened with ≥3 falsifier fields after raw 97 introduction
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: ≥3 'falsifier' lines present in raw 92 entry AND a strengthening commit exists post-raw-97 → PASS (system has self-corrected; the chronology gap is a one-time historical artifact, not a recurring leak); <3 falsifier lines → FAIL (raw 92 still violates raw 71 — strengthen blocker)

data.settings_json_pretooluse_match: absent (grep PreToolUse OR raw_registration_gate_lint returned no output)
data.raw_97_self_note: .raw line 2230 'FORWARD SPEC. self-applied 10/10. enforce path canonical hive-agent + os-level + cli-lint.' — declares forward intent, full triad not necessarily wired at registration ts

data.raw_97_scope_quote: 'every new raw rule entry added to .raw and every new own rule entry added to .own (status in {live, warn, new}). pre-existing entries grandfathered (raw 87/95/96 grandfather pattern). retroactive backfill belongs to raw 87 sync + raw 95 triad-mandate compliance ramps, NOT to raw 97. raw 97 is the gate at REGISTRATION MOMENT only.'
data.raw_92_relative_position: registered 2026-04-26 — pre-existing relative to raw 97 (registered 2026-04-27). By raw 97's own scope clause, raw 92 is GRANDFATHERED out of raw 97 retroactive checking.
data.remediation_path_per_raw_97_scope: raw 87 sync + raw 95 triad-mandate compliance ramps (not raw 97). raw 92's missing falsifier section is a raw 71 violation that raw 97 is structurally NOT designed to retroactively close.

data.raw_97_matrix_quote: tool/raw_registration_gate_lint.hexa runs a 9-check matrix (raw 2 grammar + raw 33 English + raw 43 enforce-layer + raw 71 falsifier + raw 75 >=2-layer + raw 87 paired-roadmap + raw 91 honesty-triad + raw 93 algorithm-witness + raw 95 triad-mandate)
data.implication: matrix is complete on raw 71 axis — IF the gate had been live at raw 92 reg moment, it WOULD have flagged raw 92's empty falsifier section. The non-firing therefore is NOT a matrix-design defect.

fan_out.correlation_method: axis_a (chronology) vs axis_b (tool deployment) ≈ 0.55 (both anchored to dates but tool-build is post-raw-97); axis_a vs axis_c (grandfather) ≈ 0.40 (grandfather is consequence of chronology but introduces independent scope decision); axis_a vs axis_d (matrix) ≈ 0.05 (matrix design is independent of when it was authored); pairwise mean estimated 0.18 — well below 0.7 threshold.

axes_surfaced.name: root-cause classification

options_considered.label: matrix-design defect (raw 71 missing from 9-check)
options_considered.rejected_rationale: .raw line 2189 enumerates raw 71 explicitly as check #4 — matrix is complete on this axis (F5 PASS)

options_considered.label: hook-bypass attack (some path skipped the gate)
options_considered.rejected_rationale: no hook to bypass — settings.json grep returned no PreToolUse entry referencing raw_registration_gate_lint (F3 PASS)

options_considered.label: chronology + forward-spec gap (gate did not exist at raw 92 reg moment)
raw 92 was structurally exempt via grandfather clause and remediation belongs to raw 87/95 ramps
options_considered.rejected_rationale: complementary to C, not competing — both apply; included as axis_c finding

axes_surfaced.rationale: raw 97 was registered ~25h AFTER raw 92, tool/raw_registration_gate_lint.hexa skeleton was built ~28h AFTER raw 92, and ~/.claude/settings.json does not yet contain a PreToolUse hook invoking the lint. At raw 92's registration moment the gate-spec did not exist, the lint binary did not exist, and no runtime hook existed. raw 71 mandate (≥3 falsifiers post-introduction) was therefore unenforced — author manually omitted falsifiers in raw 92's first registration. The gap was closed retroactively via commit 773c12d98 (raw 92 strengthening adding 3 falsifiers) per raw 87 sync + raw 95 triad-mandate ramps, exactly as raw 97's own scope clause specifies.

axes_surfaced.name: remediation locus (which raw owns the retroactive close)

options_considered.label: raw 97 retro-extends to pre-existing entries
options_considered.rejected_rationale: violates raw 97's own scope clause ('REGISTRATION MOMENT only'); would also violate raw 49 additive-before-destructive on the gate's defined scope

options_considered.label: raw 87 paired-roadmap-status-sync owns retroactive backfill
options_considered.rejected_rationale: partial — raw 87 covers status sync but not falsifier-section backfill specifically

options_considered.label: raw 95 triad-universal-mandate compliance ramp owns it
options_considered.rejected_rationale: partial — raw 95 covers enforce-layer triad, not falsifier authorship per se

options_considered.label: raw 71 itself + manual author re-strengthening (raw 103 completeness-order)
options_considered.rejected_rationale: selected — this is what actually happened in commit 773c12d98 ('T4 substantive authoring per raw 103 completeness-order rule')

axes_surfaced.rationale: Empirically the close-loop ran via D: commit 773c12d98 cites 'T4 substantive authoring per raw 103 completeness-order rule' and 'User directive 2026-04-27 raw 자기강화 하자 authorizes autonomous T4 work'. raw 71's grandfather strengthen (commit aaee2fb9a 'status=live grandfather (closes 84-batch falsifier pending)') closed all status=live cases first, leaving only raw 92+93 as status=new with predictive claims — and they were authored in 773c12d98. So D was the actual remediation path, with raw 87/95 as scope-adjacent compliance ramps.

axes_surfaced.name: structural-vs-procedural failure mode

options_considered.label: structural — system design is wrong (gap was inevitable)
options_considered.rejected_rationale: not inevitable — raw 71 mandate was authored 19h BEFORE raw 92; author had time + spec to comply but didn't

options_considered.label: procedural — author oversight in absence of automated gate
options_considered.rejected_rationale: selected — raw 92 first-registration commit 102d3ceec landed without falsifiers despite raw 71 mandate being live, because no PreToolUse linter blocked the write

options_considered.label: spec — raw 71 itself was unclear about post-introduction strict mode at the time
options_considered.rejected_rationale: raw 71 commit 20ecf5019 already stated post-introduction strict ≥3 falsifier mandate; spec was clear

options_considered.label: tooling — lint exists but had a defect that mis-classified raw 92 as compliant
options_considered.rejected_rationale: tool didn't exist yet (axis_b axis_a finding); not a defect-mode failure

axes_surfaced.rationale: Procedural failure: raw 71 mandate was live but unenforced at runtime. Author wrote raw 92 without running self/raw_cli verify --falsifier-strict against raw 71's check. The fix (raw 97) was authored after the failure was observed, exactly the post-hoc 'gate at REGISTRATION MOMENT' inversion that raw 97's why-clause documents ('observed cost: today's batch (raw 91-96) revealed multi-iteration rounds where individual checks were missed at first draft (raw 92 50% claim retracted post-pilot per raw 91 C3 honesty)'). raw 97 closes the loop going forward — raw 92's pre-existing gap remains a historical artifact closed by retro-strengthening.

pre_registered_falsifiers.experiment_or_observation: git-log timestamp diff raw 92 vs raw 97
read .raw raw 92 falsifier lines + git-log strengthen commit
pre_registered_falsifiers.verdict_check: ≥3 falsifier lines AND strengthen commit exists → PASS

honesty_triad.write_barrier: EMITTED: witness JSON to declared landing path with all required fields. NOT EMITTED: any new raw entry, any modification to .raw/.own/.roadmap, any tool source code change. Cycle is observe-only diagnostic; remediation already shipped in commit 773c12d98 prior to this cycle.

tier_1_promotions.title: chronology-gap diagnosis: raw 71 mandate unenforced for ~47h between raw 71 reg and lint-skeleton commit
tier_1_promotions.claim: Between 2026-04-25T18:35 (raw 71 reg) and 2026-04-27T17:41 (lint skeleton first commit), the raw 71 ≥3-falsifier-post-introduction mandate was live as text but had no automated registration-time enforcement. raw 92 (registered 2026-04-26T13:46) landed in this window with zero falsifiers and was caught only by raw 91 C3 honesty-triad post-hoc audit + manual T4 strengthening (raw 103) on 2026-04-27T22:12.

tier_1_promotions.title: raw 97 scope is structurally REGISTRATION-MOMENT-only — by design, raw 92's pre-existing gap is grandfathered out of raw 97's retroactive scope
tier_1_promotions.claim: raw 97's scope clause (.raw 2196) explicitly states 'pre-existing entries grandfathered ... raw 97 is the gate at REGISTRATION MOMENT only'. raw 92 was registered before raw 97 — therefore raw 92's missing falsifier section is, by raw 97's own design, NOT raw 97's responsibility to retroactively detect. The remediation locus is raw 87 sync + raw 95 triad-mandate ramps + raw 71 manual strengthening per raw 103 — all of which fired (commit aaee2fb9a + 773c12d98).

tier_1_promotions.title: 9-check matrix design is COMPLETE on the raw 71 axis — non-firing is chronology+forward-spec, not matrix defect
tier_1_promotions.claim: raw 97's matrix (.raw 2189) enumerates raw 71 falsifier as check #4 of 9. F5 PASS confirms the matrix would have caught raw 92's missing falsifier IF the gate had been live and the lint had been wired. Therefore: do NOT redesign the matrix; instead, prioritize tool/raw_registration_gate_lint.hexa stabilization + ~/.claude/settings.json PreToolUse wiring + os-level chflags-uchg-relock pre-hook (raw 1 transitive) so future raws cannot reproduce the raw 92 gap.

obstructions.title: PreToolUse hook NOT YET wired in ~/.claude/settings.json
obstructions.evidence: grep PreToolUse|raw_registration_gate_lint in /Users/ghost/.claude/settings.json returned no match
obstructions.impact: even with lint binary present, runtime registration-write blocking is not active — a new post-raw-71 raw could still land without falsifiers if author writes directly to .raw without invoking lint manually
obstructions.suggested_close: raw 97 follow-up #2 (.raw 2233): wire ~/.claude/settings.json#PreToolUse on Write/Edit of .raw/.own to invoke tool/raw_registration_gate_lint.hexa --strict — separate cycle, NOT part of this diagnostic

obstructions.title: raw 97 explicitly declares forward-spec status — implementation completeness uncertain
obstructions.evidence: .raw 2230 'note FORWARD SPEC. self-applied 10/10. enforce path canonical hive-agent + os-level + cli-lint.' + .raw 2236 'new -> warn at 14d zero-regression streak; warn -> live at 30d once registration-pass-rate >= 0.70 maintained 14d straight'
obstructions.impact: raw 97 is status=new — no live SLA enforcement. registration-pass-rate measurement requires audit ledger which must be cron-rotated (.raw 2235 follow-up #4)
obstructions.suggested_close: audit-ledger cron + 14d zero-regression streak measurement; converge raw 97 new→warn per its own promotion gate

fixpoint_marker: diagnose-converged: root cause = chronology + forward-spec + hook-not-wired (3-fold gap). raw 97 design is correct (matrix complete, scope deliberately registration-moment-only). raw 92 historical gap closed by commit 773c12d98 retro-strengthening per raw 103 completeness-order. Forward-looking residual = obstruction O1 (hook wiring) + O2 (status promotion). NO contradiction in system; NO new raw needed; NO matrix redesign needed.
